nasb.text: “When you enter your neighbor’s vineyard, then you may eat grapes until you are fully satisfied, but you shall not put any in your basket.

esv.text: “If you go into your neighbor’s vineyard, you may eat your fill of grapes, as many as you wish, but you shall not put any in your bag.

cnv.text: “你進了你鄰舍的葡萄園，你可以隨意吃飽葡萄，只是不可裝在你的器皿裡。

ccb.text: “如果你们进了邻居的葡萄园，可以随意吃，但不可把葡萄放在篮子里带走。
